name: Export & Organize Technology Stack Data From BuiltWith to Google Sheets
description:
Automated pipeline that exports technology stack data from BuiltWith to Google Sheets for analysis, reporting, and team collaboration.

🚀 What It Does

Extracts technology stack data
Organizes data in Google Sheets
Updates automatically on schedule
Supports multiple company tracking
Enables easy data sharing

🎯 Perfect For

Sales teams
Market researchers
Business analysts
Competitive intelligence
Technology consultants

⚙️ Key Benefits

✅ Centralized technology database  
✅ Easy data analysis  
✅ Team collaboration  
✅ Historical tracking  
✅ Custom reporting  

🔧 What You Need

BuiltWith API access
Google account
n8n instance
Google Sheets setup

📊 Data Exported

Company information
Web technologies
Hosting details
Analytics tools
Marketing technologies
Contact information
